sections.title: Engineering Mathematics
sections.topics: Linear Algebra, Calculus, Ordinary Differential Equations (ODE), Partial Differential Equations (PDE), Probability and Statistics, Numerical Methods.

sections.title: Structural Engineering
sections.topics: Engineering Mechanics, Solid Mechanics, Structural Analysis, Construction Materials and Management, Concrete Structures, Steel Structures.

sections.title: Geotechnical Engineering
sections.topics: Soil Mechanics (Index properties, consolidation, shear strength), Foundation Engineering (Shallow and deep foundations, earth pressure theories).

sections.title: Water Resources Engineering
sections.topics: Fluid Mechanics, Hydraulics, Hydrology (Hydrologic cycle, hydrographs), Irrigation (Crop water requirements, canal design, dams).

sections.title: Environmental Engineering
sections.topics: Water and Waste-Water Quality and Treatment, Air Pollution (Sources, impacts, control), Municipal Solid Wastes.

sections.title: Transportation Engineering
sections.topics: Highway Pavements (Design and materials), Traffic Engineering, Railway Systems, Airport Planning and Design.

sections.title: Geomatics Engineering
sections.topics: Principles of Surveying (Errors, leveling, traversing, triangulation), Photogrammetry, Basics of Remote Sensing and GIS.
